last_angles: Aspiration — you don't need years of experience; the right system lets you start winning before you fully understand the market
Fear — the real risk isn't misconfiguration; it's spending another year watching tutorials and staying in the same place
Educational — gold (XAUUSD) is brutal for beginners due to news sensitivity and volatility that punishes late manual entries
Curiosity — gold ignored traditional macro logic this week (oil -6%, gold still up); safe-haven demand overriding analysis
Social Proof — Sofía: zero experience, 4 months of over-researching, first profitable week on Day 8 after bot setup
Identity — JessTrading was built to reject the gatekeeping idea that you need years of screen time before you deserve a working strategy
Contrast — 2–7 years of manual learning OR one afternoon of setup; $197 skips the slow part entirely
